subject: Sync stuck at 43% for two days
body: My desktop sync has been stuck at 43% since Wednesday. I've restarted the app twice and rebooted my laptop. This is blocking me from getting new files from my team. Please help ASAP.

subject: Charged twice this month
body: I just noticed two $9 charges on my card from Loomly Cloud on the same day, July 15th. I only have one account. Can you refund the duplicate charge?

subject: Just wanted to say thanks
body: Not a support request, just wanted to say the new folder sharing UI is really clean. Great work team!

subject: Recipient says the share link is broken
body: I shared a folder with a client last week and they're now telling me the link shows an error page. I need this fixed today, we have a deadline.

subject: Feature idea: dark mode for web app
body: Would love to see a dark mode option in the web dashboard, staring at the white background at night is rough. Not urgent, just a suggestion.

subject: Webhook stopped firing after we rotated our Slack app
body: Our Slack notifications from Loomly stopped working after we rotated credentials on our end last week. Webhook logs show nothing since then. What do we need to reconnect?

subject: Locked out after losing my phone (2FA)
body: I lost my phone yesterday and can't get past the 2FA screen. I really need access to my files for a client presentation tomorrow morning. Please help me get back in.

subject: Invoice needs to go to our accountant, not me
body: Can you start sending our Team plan invoices to accounting@ourcompany.com instead of my personal email? Would make bookkeeping a lot easier on our end.
